description: Browser comparison agent plus computer-use catalogue. Browser tasks show why web_search/fetch_url fail on JavaScript-rendered pages, click-revealed widgets, multi-page flows, and post-filter data. Computer-use tasks exercise the cua-driver five-layer desktop cascade and return trajectory_dir evidence from start_recording.
course_examples: Compare 5 AI coding tools by free plan and paid plan
Compare top 3 Hugging Face text-generation models sorted by likes
Compare 5 CNC/VMC training institutes in Bangalore

submission_outline.title: Anchor mission
submission_outline.summary: Primary comparison benchmark — filter, sort, open cards, distil a comparison table, export the 8-section replay.

submission_outline.title: Marketplace maze
submission_outline.summary: Search forms, price sliders, and sort toggles on live commerce and ticketing sites.

submission_outline.title: Cross-site dossiers
submission_outline.summary: Course-style comparisons — AI pricing (STACK) and training listings (FORGE).

submission_outline.title: Cascade laboratory
submission_outline.summary: Same browser skill, cheapest correct path wins: extract → deterministic → a11y → vision → blocked.

submission_outline.title: Computer-use catalogue
submission_outline.summary: Six primary-OS desktop task categories recorded with cua-driver start_recording: deterministic Calculator, AX notes/message drafting, Cursor Electron page control, canvas-only vision, and a multi-app workflow.

design_queries.title: Browser comparison agent + replay viewer
requirements: web_search/fetch_url fail on JS-rendered pages, click-revealed widgets, multi-page flows, and post-filter/sort data — use browser.
Pick one comparison task: 3 laptops under ₹80,000 (DEAL), 5 AI coding tools free vs paid (STACK), top 3 HF models by likes (COMP), or 5 CNC/VMC institutes Bangalore (FORGE).
At least three visible browser actions — search, filter, sort, open detail pages, tabs, expand hidden content, or submit a form. Not passive search snippets.
Structured comparison table plus 8-section replay: goal, DAG, path (extract/deterministic/a11y/vision/blocked), actions, screenshots/logs, data, table, cost.
Orchestrator unchanged — new behaviour via skill catalogue or Browser skill extension only.
design_queries.verify: Run COMP from Tasks; Graph & Replay → Replay report. Or Open COMP replay demo.

design_queries.title: Computer-use skill + evidence
requirements: Keep all six requested primary-OS task categories runnable from the UI catalogue.
Show the five-layer cascade discipline in code: read → hotkey → electron page → AX → vision.
At least one task must use vision, at least one must use the Electron page path, and at least one must complete with zero vision calls.
Every computer run must call start_recording and return trajectory_dir as evidence.
design_queries.verify: Run the CU-* tasks from Tasks; each ComputerOutput includes path and trajectory_dir.

browser_findings.canvas_heavy_a11y_wins: Six real canvas-heavy targets predicted to need vision all resolved on a11y via the natural cascade.
browser_findings.vision_only_on_adversarial_fixture: Vision path required only for B4 (canvas-only.html), built to defeat a11y.
browser_findings.architecture: User goal → planner → researcher (optional URL discovery) → browser (extract → deterministic → a11y → vision → blocked) → distiller → critic → formatter → replay viewer. Gateway blocked → recover or report.
browser_findings.creative_patterns: DEAL/COMP stress filter+sort+open flows; STACK/FORGE stress multi-row tables (pricing or training listings). TICKET is an optional bonus.

computer_findings.architecture: ComputerSkill records first, then cascades read → hotkey → electron page → AX → vision; the first verified layer stops the run and stores trajectory_dir.
computer_findings.zero_vision_task: CU-CALC pins Layer 2a hotkey and verifies Calculator output without calling vision.
computer_findings.ax_notes_task: CU-AX-NOTE pins Layer 2b AX against Notepad with cheap text judgment and zero vision.
computer_findings.electron_task: CU-CURSOR uses electron_debugging_port=9222 and the cua page tool against Cursor/VS Code.
computer_findings.vision_task: CU-CANVAS opens computer/fixtures/canvas_only.html and forces Layer 3 vision because the useful target has no accessible semantics.
computer_findings.message_task: CU-MSG composes a message draft through AX and verifies the draft text from the accessibility snapshot.
computer_findings.multi_app_task: CU-MULTI switches from Calculator to Notepad and records the transferred arithmetic result in the note.
computer_findings.known_failure_modes: Cursor must be launched with remote debugging; Calculator window discovery can fail if the OS app name differs; canvas vision depends on a browser window opening the local fixture.

queries.label: COMP
queries.title: Hugging Face likes leaderboard
queries.query: Compare the top 3 Hugging Face text-generation models sorted by likes: go to https://huggingface.co/models, filter text-generation and transformers, sort by most likes, open the top three model cards, return a table (model, likes, one-line description). At least three browser actions (filter, sort, open cards). Do not use search snippets only.
queries.ui_hint: Primary demo — dropdown filters + sort + model cards.
queries.verify_hint: Path likely a11y; replay shows ≥3 actions + comparison table.

queries.label: DEAL
queries.title: Midnight laptop hunt — Flipkart
queries.query: Compare 3 laptops under ₹80,000 on Flipkart: go to https://www.flipkart.com, search laptop, filter price up to ₹80,000, sort by rating, open three product pages, return a table (name, price, CPU/RAM, rating). At least three browser actions (search, filter or sort, open pages). Do not use search snippets only.
queries.ui_hint: E-commerce maze — search box, price facet, product cards.
queries.verify_hint: Table with price + spec; replay logs filter/sort clicks.

queries.label: TICKET
queries.title: Trending repos — GitHub
queries.query: Compare 3 trending open-source repositories on GitHub: go to https://github.com/trending, optionally pick a language from the sidebar, open three repository pages from the trending list, and return a comparison table with columns: repository name, star count, primary language. Use the browser skill with at least three visible actions (scroll or filter, open repo pages). Do not use search snippets only.
queries.ui_hint: Simple list UI — trending feed, language filter, repo detail pages.
queries.verify_hint: Three repos with stars and language; replay logs open-repo clicks.

queries.label: STACK
queries.title: 5 AI coding tools — free vs paid
queries.query: Compare 5 AI coding tools by free plan and paid plan: visit official pricing for Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Codeium (Windsurf), Tabnine, and Continue.dev. Return a table (tool, free tier summary, paid starting price). At least three browser actions across the sites. Use only text from each vendor's official pricing page — put — if not listed. Do not invent model names or prices.
queries.ui_hint: Five pricing pages — browser opens up to five URLs; formatter fills any gaps from live official pages.
queries.verify_hint: Five tools with free vs paid columns; replay logs ≥3 actions.

queries.label: FORGE
queries.title: CNC/VMC training — Bangalore
queries.query: Compare 5 CNC/VMC training institutes in Bangalore: go to https://www.urbanpro.com/bangalore/cnc-programming-training, use search or filters, open five institute listings, return a table (institute, course duration, approximate fee). At least three browser actions (search, filter, or open listings). Do not use google.com.
queries.ui_hint: UrbanPro listings — search/filter then open institute detail pages.
queries.verify_hint: Five institutes with duration + fee columns; replay logs ≥3 actions.

queries.label: B1
queries.title: Ghost layer — Hacker News extract
queries.query: Using the browser skill, fetch https://news.ycombinator.com and summarize the top story listings.
queries.ui_hint: Layer 1 — httpx + trafilatura, no Playwright turns.

queries.label: B2
queries.title: Selector sniper — Amazon SKU
queries.query: Using browser, search Amazon for a laptop and extract title, price, brand, and description from the top product page.
queries.ui_hint: Layer 2a — CSS selectors on a product detail page.

queries.label: B3
queries.title: Dropdown diplomat — HF filters
queries.query: Go to https://huggingface.co/models, filter by text-generation, filter by transformers, sort by most likes, and read the top three model cards.
queries.ui_hint: Layer 2b — a11y tree + LLM turns (same site family as COMP).

queries.label: B4
queries.title: Red circle ritual — vision only
queries.query: Open http://127.0.0.1:8080/sandbox/browser/canvas-only.html via browser. Click inside the red circle. Do not guess.
queries.ui_hint: Layer 3 — set-of-marks after a11y returns an empty tree.

queries.label: CU-CALC
queries.title: Calculator hotkey arithmetic
queries.query: Using the computer skill on my primary OS, open Calculator and compute 847 * 293. Use Layer 2a deterministic hotkeys only, record the run with start_recording, and return the numeric result plus trajectory_dir evidence.
queries.ui_hint: Layer 2a — deterministic OS hotkey/button path, no LLM and zero vision calls.

queries.label: CU-CURSOR
queries.title: Cursor Electron proof note
queries.query: Using the computer skill on my primary OS, in Cursor create or update notes/computer_use_evidence.txt with the text 'computer-use layer2b ok'. Use the Electron page path with electron_debugging_port=9222, record the run with start_recording, and return trajectory_dir evidence.

computer_metadata.goal: In Cursor create or update notes/computer_use_evidence.txt with the text 'computer-use layer2b ok'.

queries.ui_hint: Layer 2b — Cursor/VS Code via cua page tool and CDP text, no vision.
queries.verify_hint: Launch Cursor with computer/scripts/launch_cursor_debug.ps1 first; path=electron and trajectory_dir populated.

queries.label: CU-AX-NOTE
queries.title: Notepad AX status note
queries.query: Using the computer skill on my primary OS, open Notepad and create a short status note that says 'AX layer verified for notes'. Use the AX tree with cheap text judgment only, record the run with start_recording, and return trajectory_dir evidence.

computer_metadata.goal: Open Notepad and create a short status note that says 'AX layer verified for notes'.

queries.ui_hint: Layer 2b — AX tree plus cheap text judgment in a notes app, zero vision calls.
queries.verify_hint: ComputerOutput.path=ax and final AX snapshot contains 'AX layer verified for notes'.

queries.label: CU-CANVAS
queries.title: Canvas-only red circle
queries.query: Using the computer skill on my primary OS, open the canvas fixture and click inside the red circle. Force Layer 3 vision because the target has no useful ARIA/AX tree, record the run with start_recording, and return trajectory_dir evidence.

computer_metadata.goal: Open the canvas fixture and click inside the red circle.

queries.ui_hint: Layer 3 — canvas-rendered target with no semantic controls, vision must choose pixel coordinates.
queries.verify_hint: ComputerOutput.path=vision and trajectory_dir contains vision_turn_*.png artifacts.

queries.label: CU-MSG
queries.title: Message draft via AX
queries.query: Using the computer skill on my primary OS, open Notepad and draft this message: 'Hi team, the desktop automation evidence is recorded and ready for review.' Use Layer 2b AX with strong text verification, record the run with start_recording, and return trajectory_dir evidence.

computer_metadata.goal: Open Notepad and draft this message: 'Hi team, the desktop automation evidence is recorded and ready for review.' Verify the exact draft text from the AX snapshot.

queries.ui_hint: Layer 2b — message draft composition through AX element indices and text verification.
queries.verify_hint: ComputerOutput.path=ax and final AX snapshot contains the exact draft message.

queries.label: CU-MULTI
queries.title: Calculator to Notepad handoff
queries.query: Using the computer skill on my primary OS, compute 847 * 293 in Calculator, then switch to Notepad and write 'Calculator result: 248171'. Use deterministic hotkeys/scripts, record the run with start_recording, and return trajectory_dir evidence.

computer_metadata.goal: Compute 847 * 293 in Calculator, then switch to Notepad and write 'Calculator result: 248171'.

queries.ui_hint: Multi-app workflow — switches from Calculator to Notepad and records the result transfer.
queries.verify_hint: ComputerOutput.path=hotkey; action log shows Calculator then Notepad with trajectory_dir populated.
